# phala_cvm_power (Resource)

Manages CVM power state (running/stopped).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cvm_id` (String) Target CVM ID.
- `state` (String) Desired power state: running or stopped.

### Optional

- `wait_for_state` (Boolean) Wait until the target state is reached after start/stop.
- `wait_timeout_seconds` (Number) Timeout for wait_for_state.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Power state resource ID (same as cvm_id).
- `status` (String) Current CVM status from API.
